description_long: This is a high-top sneaker with a smooth, gradient color scheme transitioning from peachy orange at the toe to a soft lavender at the heel. The shoe features a white rubber toe cap and sole, with light blue laces threaded through eight pairs of white eyelets. On the outer ankle area, there is a circular Converse All Star logo patch in beige and white. The upper material appears to be a synthetic or canvas fabric, while the sole is made of rubber. The overall design is clean, modern, and visually striking, suitable for casual urban wear.
description: A high-top sneaker with a peach-to-lavender gradient, white rubber toe and sole, blue laces, and a Converse All Star logo patch.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded white toe cap, blue laces, and the gradient color transition starting from the toe.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the smooth gradient from orange to lavender and the clean, uninterrupted side profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the vertical seam and the full heel area in lavender, with the white sole wrapping around.
description_view_3: Right side view features the Converse All Star logo patch and the full lacing system, with the gradient color clearly visible.
attribute_logo: Circular Converse All Star patch on the outer ankle, beige and white with a star in the center.
